bulk.title: Bulk Payment Status
bulk.subtitle: Mark multiple entries or clubs as paid/unpaid with one auditable operation.
bulk.select_one: Select at least one entry ID or club ID.
bulk.invalid_uuid: All IDs must be valid UUIDs.
bulk.error: Failed to bulk update payment status

club.title: Club Payment Status
club.update_success: Club payment status updated for {count} entries
club.update_error: Failed to update club payment status

home.invoices_description: Generate, refresh, and review invoices for each club.

invoice.list_description: Track invoice generation jobs, review details, and mark invoices as paid.
invoice.generate_pending: Invoice generation is queued. Refresh later if it remains pending.
invoice.generate_success: Invoice generation completed and the invoice list was refreshed.
invoice.mark_paid_error: Failed to mark invoice as paid
invoice.actor_required: A signed-in staff identity is required to record who marked this invoice as paid.

adjudication.title: Adjudication
adjudication.subtitle: Manage investigations, penalties, DSQs, exclusions, and revision-impact messaging.
adjudication.empty: Select an investigation or open one for an entry to begin adjudication.

confirmation.title: Confirm {action}
confirmation.current_state: Current state: {status}, result label {resultLabel}, results revision {revision}.
confirmation.latest_history: Latest adjudication history: {action} by {actor} at revision {revision}.

prompts.dsq: Disqualify {crew}? This result-affecting change will be added to adjudication history.
prompts.exclusion: Exclude {crew}? This destructive change will be added to adjudication history.
prompts.revert_dsq: Revert the DSQ for {crew}? This restoration will also be recorded in adjudication history.

errors.open_required: Entry ID and description are required to open an investigation.
errors.action_required: A reason is required before applying an adjudication action.
errors.invalid_penalty_seconds: Penalty seconds must be a whole number greater than zero.

operator_access.title: Operator access
operator_access.description: Manage operator tokens, PDF fallback instructions, and staff-visible handoff oversight for this regatta.
operator_access.authorization_denied: You are not authorized to create, revoke, or reveal operator access for this regatta.

errors.invalid_validity_window: Valid until must be after valid from.
errors.export_token: Failed to export operator token PDF.
errors.load_handoffs: Failed to load pending station handoffs.
errors.reveal_pin: Failed to reveal station handoff PIN.

tokens.title: Issued tokens
tokens.fallback_instructions: Fallback: if QR scan fails, open the operator access URL manually and provide the station PIN from the exported PDF.

handoff.title: Handoff oversight
handoff.description: Review pending station handoffs across the regatta, filter by station or token, and reveal the PIN remotely when the admin fallback endpoint is available.
handoff.empty: No pending handoffs match the current filters.

export.export_printables_aria: Start asynchronous export job for printable documents

printables.title: Regatta Printables
printables.description: Export printable regatta documents and verify the print header metadata before downloading.

draw_workflow.title: Draw Workflow
draw_workflow.description: Generate, publish, and manage the race draw

generate.title: Generate Draw
generate.invalid_seed: Seed must be a safe integer
generate.copy_failed: Failed to copy seed to clipboard

publish.title: Publish Draw
publish.confirm_message: This will increment draw_revision from {from} to {to}
publish.confirm_warning: Published draws enable public schedule visibility
publish.confirm_note: Use Unpublish to regenerate if needed

unpublish.title: Unpublish Draw
unpublish.confirm_message: This will unpublish the current draw and update draw_revision from {current}
unpublish.confirm_warning: This will hide the schedule from public view
unpublish.confirm_note: You can regenerate and republish after unpublishing

blocks.title: Blocks & Bib Pools
blocks.subtitle: Configure timing blocks and bib pool allocations
blocks.delete_block_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this block?
blocks.delete_bib_pool_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bib pool?
blocks.reorder_instructions: Use drag and drop or arrow keys to reorder blocks
blocks.reorder_keyboard_hint: Press Enter or Space to start reordering, use arrow keys to move, then press Enter or Space to confirm

bib_pool.name: Pool Name
bib_pool.keyboard_reorder_instructions: Use arrow keys to reorder, Space or Enter to start moving, Escape to cancel
bib_pool.keyboard_move_active: Move mode active. Current target position: {position}.

blocks.reorder_error: Failed to reorder bib pools. Changes reverted.

validation.start_time_format: Start time must be a valid date and time
validation.end_bib_greater: End bib must be greater than or equal to start bib
validation.block_assignment_required: Block assignment is required for non-overflow pools
validation.bib_numbers_format: Bib numbers must be unique comma-separated integers (minimum 1)

rulesets.title: Rulesets
rulesets.loadError: Failed to load rulesets. Please try again.

actions.promote_confirm: Are you sure you want to promote this ruleset to global? This action cannot be undone.

messages.duplicate_error: Duplication error: Failed to duplicate ruleset
messages.promote_forbidden: You do not have permission to promote rulesets. Only super administrators can perform this action.
messages.read_only_after_publish: This ruleset is read-only because the draw has been published.

regattas.title: Regattas
regattas.description: Select a regatta to work with
regattas.access_hint: Open the link provided by your regatta administrator to access your assigned regatta.

regatta.title: Regatta
regatta.missing_block_scope: Operator token must include a block scope before starting a capture session.

line_scan.title: Line Scan
line_scan.description: Capture line scan images and mark finish times

capture.title: Line Scan Capture
capture.evidence_workspace: Review evidence, capture markers from the selected frame, and resolve queued sync issues from one workspace.
capture.no_visible_markers: No markers fall inside the current detail window.
capture.evidence_reason_manifest_missing: No persisted evidence manifest is available for this capture session yet.
capture.evidence_reason_manifest_has_no_tiles: The evidence manifest exists, but it does not expose any persisted tiles yet.
capture.evidence_reason_tile_upload_pending: Some persisted evidence tiles are still uploading. Review is available, but the stage is incomplete.
capture.evidence_reason_tile_upload_failed: At least one persisted evidence tile failed to upload. Review is available, but the evidence stage is degraded.
capture.evidence_upload_pending_hint: Tiles are captured locally and waiting to be persisted remotely.
capture.evidence_upload_syncing_hint: Some tiles are already persisted remotely while the rest are still uploading.
capture.evidence_upload_partial_failure_hint: Some tiles persisted, but at least one failed. Retry the same tile upload without recapturing.
capture.evidence_upload_failed_hint: The upload failed for every tile that was attempted. Retry the same tile upload without recapturing.
capture.evidence_upload_completed_hint: All tiles are persisted remotely and available for review.
capture.preview_state_unsupported: Live preview is not available here. This workspace is rendering persisted evidence only.
capture.preview_state_closed: Capture is closed. Persisted evidence remains available for review only.
capture.session_closed_review_only: Session closed: review remains available, but capture stays read-only.
capture.evidence_stage_aria: Persisted evidence stage with overlay markers and review cursor
capture.overview_controls: Overview controls - use pointer or keyboard to navigate the viewport
capture.viewport_indicator: Viewport indicator - drag to adjust detail window position
capture.queue_policy_manual: Backend returned a generic conflict. Reload the latest marker state and retry only if the change still belongs here.
capture.queue_policy_lww_unavailable: Conflict policy should be last-write-wins for unapproved marker edits, but the backend does not yet expose a force-override or conflict-resolution endpoint. Reload and retry after review.
capture.queue_policy_missing_server_timestamp: The backend did not return server timing metadata, so last-write-wins could not be applied safely. Reload and retry after review.
capture.approval_scope_note: This workspace supports marker approval only. Entry and event approval remain outside the operator surface.
capture.device_controls_not_writable: Device controls are not writable for this session (session closed or device does not support write access).
capture.conflict_detected: A conflict was detected. See the conflict panel below.

errors.capture_session_timing_missing: Capture session timing metadata is missing. Load the session before creating or adjusting markers.
errors.failed_load_workspace: Failed to load the persisted evidence workspace
errors.failed_sync_queue: Failed to sync queued marker mutations
errors.frame_offset_invalid: Frame offset must be a non-negative whole number
errors.live_source_unavailable: No usable evidence source is available for capture right now.
errors.operator_token_required: Operator token is required before queueing marker changes

capture.preview_state_inactive: Live preview is currently inactive. Capture is in progress.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: View the race schedule with local start times and lane assignments.
schedule.empty: No schedule entries available for this revision.

recovery.saved_regatta_hint: This link is missing regatta context. You can recover using the last regatta opened on this device.

results.title: Results
results.empty: No results published for this revision yet.

recovery.missing_regatta: Missing regatta context. Re-open the published results link for this regatta.
recovery.bootstrap_failed: Unable to refresh public results right now.

unauthorized.description: You do not have permission to access this page.
